_comment: Project-level settings for Claude Code on the web. The sandbox.allowedDomains
list extends the harness's default network egress allowlist for sessions
started in this repo. Without these, huggingface.co returns
'x-deny-reason: host_not_allowed' and Bonsai weight inspection requires
datasets-server, etc.); the bare 'huggingface.co' is listed explicitly because
many allowlist implementations don't fold the apex into the wildcard.
Adding a domain only takes effect at the start of a NEW session — the
egress proxy is initialized at sandbox spin-up.
